system.description:
The psyker completely reprograms another mind, reshaping memories and experiences. Takes 2d5 Rounds minimum. Make an Opposed Willpower Test; gain +10 per 2 Psy Rating used. Depth depends on DoS: DoS 1 = Sow Confusion (–20 to recall one event); DoS 2 = Implant Falsehood; DoS 3 = Rewritten History; DoS 4 = Sculpt Synapses (inflicts 1d5 Insanity on subject); DoS 5+ = Psychic Block (+10 WP to resist future Mind Probes, conceals tampering). Effects are permanent unless forcibly broken down. If the target wins the Opposed Test, the psyker cannot re-attempt for 1d5 hours.

Focus Power Test: Opposed Willpower

Prerequisites: Dominate, Mind Probe

XP Cost: 500
